description: Frozen corpus proving the graph impact-explainer surface honors named-workset, sparse-slice, and policy-limited-view scope boundaries: in-scope impact edges stay visible, sibling-scope impact edges are counted out-of-scope (labeled, not silently dropped), and policy-hidden members are disclosed through the scope descriptor. scope_class_vocabulary_map pins the 1:1 mapping between the graph WorksetScopeClass vocabulary and the aureline-workspace ScopeClass vocabulary so the search, graph, AI, refactor, and export surfaces share one scope-truth vocabulary instead of a divergent label set.
